title: Training Executive
description:
Job Purpose

The Training Executive is responsible for planning, delivering, coordinating, and continuously improving training programmes to ensure employees are competent, compliant, and aligned with operational and safety requirements.

Key Responsibilities

1. Training Planning & Coordination

  • Plan, schedule, and coordinate training programmes based on operational needs and manpower requirements.

  • Work closely with operations, supervisors, and management to identify training needs and priorities.

  • Maintain training calendars and ensure optimal resource allocation.

2. Training Content Development

  • Develop, update, and maintain training materials, including presentations, manuals, SOPs, and assessment tools.

  • Ensure training content is aligned with company standards, safety requirements, and regulatory guidelines.

  • Customize training materials for different roles and skill levels.

3. Training Delivery & Facilitation

  • Conduct classroom, practical, and on-the-job training sessions effectively.

  • Demonstrate equipment operation, processes, and safety procedures where applicable.

  • Assess trainee understanding and competency through tests, observations, and practical evaluations.

4. Training Administration & Record Management

  • Maintain accurate training records, attendance, certifications, and competency assessments.

  • Prepare training reports and documentation for internal review, audits, or regulatory requirements.

  • Ensure training documentation is complete, up to date, and properly filed.

5. Training Evaluation & Continuous Improvement

  • Collect and analyze training feedback and assessment results to evaluate training effectiveness.

  • Identify training gaps and recommend improvements to training content and delivery methods.

  • Support continuous improvement initiatives related to training processes.

6. Compliance & Safety Support

  • Ensure training programmes meet internal policies, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.

  • Support audits, inspections, and compliance reviews related to training and competency.

  • Reinforce safety awareness and compliance culture through training.

7. Stakeholder Support & Communication

  • Provide training-related support and guidance to employees and supervisors.

  • Coordinate with internal departments and external vendors or trainers when required.

  • Communicate training schedules, requirements, and updates clearly to stakeholders.

Requirements & Skills

  • Diploma or Degree in Training, Human Resources, Engineering, Operations, or related field.

  • Experience in training coordination or delivery (technical or operational training preferred).

  • Strong communication, facilitation, and presentation skills.

  • Good organizational and documentation skills.

  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply.

  • Familiarity with safety, operational, or regulatory training is an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Neptune Robotics Pte. Ltd. was established in Singapore in 2024. We provide world-class robotic services by using a World Class Automated Biofouling Management and Robotic Hull Cleaning System.


At Neptune Robotics, we use robotics to reduce maritime fuel consumption and carbon emissions to achieve Net Zero before 2050.


Neptune Robotics provide our clients gateway to the latest and in-depth Shipping Industry Information. Dive into valuable industry insights and professional advice catered to Shipowners, Ship Managers, and Maritime Operators. Discover how our cutting-edge technology transforms operations and maximizes efficiency for a smarter, sustainable maritime future.


Please send your CV to jane.zou@neptune-robotics.com if you are interested in any position.
